title: feeling like a jackson cuz a mic exist (2)
description: Lyrics from feeling like a jackson cuz a mic exist (2)
body:
- ))}}
    - ))}}
        - [stream 07262021 - feeling like a jackson cuz a mic exist by billy | listen online for free on soundcloud](https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/07262021-feeling-like-a-jackson-cuz-a-mic-exist)
- ))}}
    - but it don't help but it don't help
it's ok though cuz i can't help myself
the only one who could ever help me
was a me that came before
the only one who could ever reach me
was the one that walked right through that door
right behind me
just to find me
and see what i see
love is blinding
insight binding
inside voices when i need reminding
that it's my choices that keep me tied in
it's my dials
i can stop turning when i'm trying to tune in
or i'm tired of tuning
or the quiet's too loud and the noise is soothing
applause implies crowds
i like empty rooms and rumors about how i do it
make em make em flap their lips
take it give it back and flipped
thank god i found rap and lived out loud
i didn't know how as a kid without getting hit
now i'm ten toes down i stopped countin kicks
trouble can't find me when i ground like this
power posed from my feet to my fist
feeling like a jackson cuz a mike exist
